Subject: RE: Latest from BE Washington pre-inauguration

Nick,

Thanks also from me. | know you're also pursuing ; please do
keep us updated on this chain how that is going, so we can keep things well lashed
together. Same for comms: lets make sure to join up the various strands here, so we
can co-ordinate effectively; not least in the expectation that we’ _re going to see a
number of fairly high profile announcements from the white House in the coming

eee

days, and we’ __ Il want to be very joined up on any responses/commentary.
Many thanks again,

Caroline

Caroline Hurndall | PPS/FS | Personal

The Foreign Secretary’ s box deadline is midday, Monday to Thursday. Please allow a
minimum of 48hrs to process work sent to FSPO. Please also copy JCS to
all submissions/updates to the Foreign Secretary.

Many thanks for this.
Please proceed with setting up a brief call for the PM. 
 can work 
with you on timings. The PM will also write, we will send you this tomorrow.
Matthew Doyle and team will confirm separately the media plan but thanks for the 
advice on this.
Obviously a key priority immediately after inauguration will be a visit for the PM so 
please do seek to advance this through conversations this week and keep us 
updated.
I'll come back separately on Lord Mandelson.
Ailsa

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG USE ONLY

Meeting Readout - Minister Alexander / Lord Mandelson Jan 21 2025

Attendees:
Minister Alexander
Lord Mandelson

Jes - Private Secretary

--- READOUT ---

The meeting was organised ahead of LM's move to DC to take up his position as US
Ambassador. He and MA spoke for a few minutes at the start of the meeting about
LM's political reflections on the Trump administration and how MA was considering
narrative/positioning around the US in the forthcoming Trade Strategy. LM and MA
then asked Private Office to leave the room so they could continue the rest of their
conversation politically.

192
